title: Plans
subtitle: Turn your goals into concrete timelines, then run FinOpt to see the shortest path toward them.

summary.onTrackDetail: Plans whose latest result currently meets every goal.
summary.needReviewDetail: Plans that are tight, infeasible, or had a failed run.
summary.needFirstRunDetail: Plans that have been drafted but never calculated.

needSituation: Create a situation first before building a plan.
emptyBody: Start with a goal and FinOpt will estimate how long it may take to reach it.
yourPlansSubtitle: Live plans connected to your own situations and results.
yourPlansEmptySubtitle: Create your first plan to start tracking timeline, health, and progress here.
examplesSubtitle: Demo plans you can explore without affecting your own data.

latestDetail.demo: Open the saved result to explore how a complete example looks.
latestDetail.noRuns: Run the optimizer to estimate the path toward your goals.
latestDetail.completedNoSummary: Completed {{date}}. The saved result summary is not available yet.
latestDetail.completedNeedsChanges: Completed {{date}}. Review the result and adjust your inputs.
latestDetail.completedReady: Completed {{date}}. Open the result to review the allocation path.
latestDetail.failed: Last attempt was on {{date}}. Update the plan and try again.
latestDetail.running: Started {{date}}. You can open the run to follow progress.

toast.reachFailed: Failed to reach the compute service
toast.noResultsDetail: This demo has no computed results.
